name: message_recipients
title: Message Recipients
description: Normalized To/Cc/Bcc addressing for one message -- one row per address. A faithful port of a private predecessor-system audit's MessageRecipient model, not part of this repo: the source normalized recipients into their own table rather than flattening an address list onto Message, and this package follows that same split (see schemas/messages.json's description). No page in this package creates a message_recipients row directly in v1 -- addresses only ever get attached to a message by hand, by a seed, or by the deferred send/sync transport (see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list); forms.default is kept for schema-generator consistency, same posture as messages.json's own unused form.
